block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,4@大命乎親王王臣百官人等天下公民衆聞宣,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu
mi kamwi to
opo ya sima sira si myesu

sentence.kanji: 倭根子天皇大命良麻止宣
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 大命乎親王王臣百官人等天下公民衆聞宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: takama no para ni kamu dumari ma su sumyera ga mutu kamu rwoki kamu rwomi mikoto no sadame tamapi kye ru ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no tugite wo kaswopi ubapi nusuma mu to site asi ku sakasima ni aru yatukwo kunatabure madwopi naramaro kwomaro ra i sakasima ni aru tomogara wo izanapi pikiwite madu naisau no ipye wo kakumite so wo korosite sunapati opo tono wo kakumite pi tugi no mi kwo wo sirizokete tugi ni pa opo mi oya no mikadwo wo katabuke suzu osite sirusi wo torite migi no opo mapye tu kimi wo myesite ame no sita ni nori goto se sime mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,1@皇親神魯岐神魯弥命乃定賜来流,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,2@天日嗣高御座次乎加蘇毗奪将盗止為而,*
IP-MAT,PP-SBJ,NP,NP,5@奴久奈多夫礼麻度比奈良麻呂古麻呂等伊逆,*

sentence.transcription: takama no para ni kamu dumari ma su

sentence.kanji: 皇親神魯岐神魯弥命乃定賜来流
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga mutu kamu rwoki kamu rwomi mikoto no sadame tamapi kye ru

sentence.kanji: 天日嗣高御座次乎加蘇毗奪将盗止為而
sentence.transcription: ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no tugite wo kaswopi ubapi nusuma mu to site
asi ku
sakasima ni aru

sentence.kanji: 奴久奈多夫礼麻度比奈良麻呂古麻呂等伊逆
sentence.transcription: yatukwo kunatabure madwopi naramaro kwomaro ra i sakasima ni aru
tomogara wo izanapi pikiwite
madu naisau no ipye wo kakumite
so wo korosite
sunapati opo tono wo kakumite
pi tugi no mi kwo wo sirizokete
tugi ni pa opo mi oya no mikadwo wo katabuke
suzu osite sirusi wo torite
migi no opo mapye tu kimi wo myesite
ame no sita ni nori goto se sime mu

block.header: sikaru noti ni mikadwo wo sirizokete yota ri no opo kimi no uti ni erabite kimi to na se mu to pakarite mina dukwi no patuka amari kokono ka no pi no ywo opo maturi goto no tukasa ni irite sipo siru wo nomite tikapi ame tuti yo mo wo worogamite pumi dukwi no putu ka no pi ni ikusa wo okosa mu to pakari sadamete putu ka no pi no pituzi no toki ni wo nwo no aduma pito naka no mamori no tukasa no toneri kibwi no miti no kuti no kuni no kami tu miti no kopori no pito kami tu miti no asomi pwidatu wo ywobite atorapete ipa ku ko no koto tomo ni se to izanapu ni yorite tomo ni se mu to koto pa yurusite so no pi no wi no toki ni tubusa ni mawosi tamapi tu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-NMZ-FRM,4@六月廿九日乃夜入太政官坊而,*
IP-MAT,IP-NMZ-FRM,7@七月二日発兵牟止謀定而,*
IP-MAT,IP-NMZ-FRM,8@二日未時小野東人喚中衛舍人備前国上道郡人上道朝臣斐太都而誂云久,*
IP-MAT,9@此事倶仁西止伊射奈布尔依而,*

sentence.transcription: sikaru
noti ni mikadwo wo sirizokete
yota ri no opo kimi no uti ni erabite
kimi to na se mu to pakarite

sentence.kanji: 六月廿九日乃夜入太政官坊而
sentence.transcription: mina dukwi no patuka amari kokono ka no pi no ywo opo maturi goto no tukasa ni irite
sipo siru wo nomite tikapi
ame tuti yo mo wo worogamite

sentence.kanji: 七月二日発兵牟止謀定而
sentence.transcription: pumi dukwi no putu ka no pi ni ikusa wo okosa mu to pakari sadamete

sentence.kanji: 二日未時小野東人喚中衛舍人備前国上道郡人上道朝臣斐太都而誂云久
sentence.transcription: putu ka no pi no pituzi no toki ni wo nwo no aduma pito naka no mamori no tukasa no toneri kibwi no miti no kuti no kuni no kami tu miti no kopori no pito kami tu miti no asomi pwidatu wo ywobite atorapete ipa ku

sentence.kanji: 此事倶仁西止伊射奈布尔依而
sentence.transcription: ko no koto tomo ni se to izanapu ni yorite
tomo ni se mu to
koto pa yurusite
so no pi no wi no toki ni tubusa ni mawosi tamapi tu

block.header: kore ni yorite kamugape twopi tamapu ni koto goto ni makoto to mawosite mwina tumi ni pusi nu

sentence.transcription: kore ni yorite
kamugape twopi tamapu ni
koto goto ni makoto to mawosite
mwina tumi ni pusi nu

block.header: koko wo motite nori wo kamugapuru ni mwina korosu tumi ni atar eri

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite
nori wo kamugapuru ni mwina korosu
tumi ni atar eri

block.header: kaku aredomo utukusibwi tamapu to site pito sina karome tamapite kabane na kapete topo ku nagasu tumi ni wosame tamapi tu

sentence.transcription: kaku aredomo
utukusibwi tamapu to site
pito sina karome tamapite
kabane na kapete topo ku nagasu
tumi ni wosame tamapi tu

block.header: kore makoto ni ame tuti no kamwi no utukusibwi tama pi mamori tama pi kake maku mo kasikwo ki ame tuti pirakete ywori ko no kata ame no sita sira si myesi si sumyera ga opo mi tama tati no kitana ki yatukwo domo wo kirapi tamapi sute tama pu ni yori te mata ru siya na nyo rai kwanzeon bosati gopopu bonwau taisyaku si dai tenwau no pukasi giwi zin no tikara ni yori te si ko no sakasima ni aru asi ki yatukwo domo pa arapare idete koto goto ni tumi ni pusi nurasi to namo kamu nagara mo omoposi mye su to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moromoro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,0@此誠天地神乃慈賜比護賜比,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,4@奴等乎伎良比賜弃賜布尔依弖,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,5@又盧舍那如来観世音菩薩護法梵王帝釈四大天王乃不可思議威神之力尔依弖志,*

sentence.kanji: 此誠天地神乃慈賜比護賜比
sentence.transcription: kore makoto ni ame tuti no kamwi no utukusibwi tama pi mamori tama pi
kake maku mo kasikwo ki
ame tuti pirakete ywori ko no kata ame no sita sira si myesi si
sumyera ga opo mi tama tati no kitana ki

sentence.kanji: 奴等乎伎良比賜弃賜布尔依弖
sentence.transcription: yatukwo domo wo kirapi tamapi sute tama pu ni yori te

sentence.kanji: 又盧舍那如来観世音菩薩護法梵王帝釈四大天王乃不可思議威神之力尔依弖志
sentence.transcription: mata ru siya na nyo rai kwanzeon bosati gopopu bonwau taisyaku si dai tenwau no pukasi giwi zin no tikara ni yori te si
ko no sakasima ni aru asi ki
yatukwo domo pa arapare idete

sentence.kanji: 悉罪尔伏奴良志止奈母
sentence.transcription: koto goto ni tumi ni pusi nurasi to namo

sentence.kanji: 神奈賀良母所念行湏止宣
sentence.transcription: kamu nagara mo omoposi mye su to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moromoro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapa ku kunatabure ra ni azamuk are taru opo mi takara pa mi satwo no tuti puma mu koto kitana mi ide pa no kuni no wo kati no mura no kinope ni utusi tamapa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,4@出羽国小勝村乃柵戸尔移賜久止宣,*

sentence.transcription: koto wakite nori tamapa ku

sentence.kanji: 久奈多夫礼良尔所詿誤
sentence.transcription: kunatabure ra ni azamuk are taru
opo mi takara pa mi satwo no tuti puma mu
koto kitana mi

sentence.kanji: 出羽国小勝村乃柵戸尔移賜久止宣
sentence.transcription: ide pa no kuni no wo kati no mura no kinope ni utusi tamapa ku to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
